Hi Keepers,

Our translation exe thing is broken and we're trying our best to fix it; the translated stuff isn't being imported into the game correctly...

Right now, English translation of the new version content should be largely available (except 3 entries), but other languages may be missing translation here and there<:cry2:1356068126894194758> 
We'lll be fixing it tonight, not leaving the office until we're certain it's been fixed.

In the meantime, please temporarily switch to English if you encounter missing translation<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

fun observation I made with castor's sprite and his animations:
the holes in his wings are where the coverts (primary/greater coverts, secondary/lesser coverts, and inner coverts) would be -- this matches up with his battle animations where the feathers he's flinging around come from that general area of the wing. it's a small detail but it's neat!
(makes me very sad though. castor please. you are allowed to keep your feathers)
